title: serpocaulon subandinum
intro: Serpocaulon subandinum, also known as "Mistinha", is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly referred to as a type of fern. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits associated with Serpocaulon subandinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Serpocaulon subandinum can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
